summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V3 Item Features: minimum stock by day, item visibility per unit, new units of measure (bottle, bucket, can, bag, pack), and duplicate item prevention. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI features working correctly with proper form validation and error handling.

issues: Chart library console warnings about width/height dimensions - cosmetic only, charts display correctly

passed_tests: Units of measure endpoint returns all 17 units including new ones (bottle, bucket, can, bag, pack)
Company creation with admin user via register-first endpoint
Section CRUD operations
Unit CRUD operations with initials for order numbering
Item creation with basic fields (name, section, unit_of_measure, minimum_stock)
Item creation with new unit of measure: bottle
Item creation with new unit of measure: bucket
Item creation with new unit of measure: can
Item creation with new unit of measure: bag
Item creation with new unit of measure: pack
Item creation with minimum_stock_by_day (daily minimums for Mon-Sun)
Item update with minimum_stock_by_day - values persist correctly
Item creation with null minimum_stock_by_day
Item creation with visible_in_units (specific unit visibility)
Item creation with empty visible_in_units (visible in all units)
Items filtering by unit_id query parameter
Duplicate item prevention - same name, section, unit returns 400 error
Same name in different section allowed
Same name with different unit of measure allowed
Item update with all V3 fields (unit, daily min stock, visibility, item_type)
Get all items retrieves items with all required fields
Frontend: Items page loads with 3-tab dialog (Basic Info, Min Stock, Visibility)
Frontend: Unit of Measure dropdown shows all 17 units
Frontend: Minimum stock by day toggle enables 7 day inputs
Frontend: Visibility tab shows Show in Reports toggle and unit checkboxes
Frontend: Duplicate item creation shows proper error toast
Frontend: Edit item dialog loads with saved values correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test company, section (Test Produce Section), unit (Main Kitchen MK), and test items via UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 item features fully tested and working. New features include: minimum_stock_by_day (object with monday-sunday keys), visible_in_units (array of unit IDs), new units of measure (bottle, bucket, can, bag, pack), and duplicate item prevention based on name+section+unit combination. Test user uitest@test.com created with admin role.

minimum_stock_by_day.backend: POST/PUT /api/items accepts minimum_stock_by_day object with day keys
minimum_stock_by_day.frontend: Min Stock tab shows toggle 'Use different minimum per day' with 7 day inputs

visible_in_units.backend: POST/PUT /api/items accepts visible_in_units array, GET /api/items?unit_id filters by visibility
visible_in_units.frontend: Visibility tab shows checkboxes for each unit with helper text

new_units_of_measure.backend: GET /api/units-of-measure returns bottle, bucket, can, bag, pack among 17 total
new_units_of_measure.frontend: Unit of Measure dropdown shows all units

duplicate_prevention.backend: POST /api/items returns 400 with message 'Item with same name, section and unit already exists'
duplicate_prevention.frontend: Error toast displays duplicate error message
